rate.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (2 EDGE Miles per INR 100 on eligible categories; 1/100 applied before 2022-12-20, historical only)

multiplier.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (5 EDGE Miles per INR 100 = 2.5x base on Travel EDGE portal bookings)

monthly_cap_points.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (derived: INR 2,00,000/month accelerated spend cap x 5 EDGE Miles per INR 100 = 10,000 EDGE Miles/month ceiling)

accelerated.notes: Travel EDGE portal bookings; above the INR 2L/month spend cap earning drops to base 2/100 (base fallback on excess not modeled — entry cap clips); crediting within 12 days

multiplier.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (5 EDGE Miles per INR 100 = 2.5x base on direct airline and direct hotel bookings, identified via MCC codes)

monthly_cap_points.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (derived: INR 2,00,000/month cumulative accelerated spend cap x 5 EDGE Miles per INR 100 = 10,000 EDGE Miles/month ceiling, shared with Travel EDGE)

accelerated.notes: Direct airline/hotel only (MCC-identified); third-party travel agents/OTAs earn base 2/100, never accelerated; crediting within 12 days

cap_points.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (derived from the INR 2,00,000/month cumulative accelerated spend cap)

caps.notes: Cumulative across Travel EDGE portal + direct airline + direct hotel; above cap, spend earns base rate

spend_threshold.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19

bonus_points.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19

milestones.notes: Anniversary-year cumulative spend, excluding the same categories as earn exclusions; primary + add-on spends count; credited within 30 days of milestone

spend_threshold.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19

bonus_points.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (additional; cumulative 5,000 EDGE Miles at INR 7.5L)

milestones.notes: Additional 2,500 EDGE Miles at INR 7,50,000 cumulative spend

spend_threshold.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (additional; cumulative 10,000 EDGE Miles at INR 15L)

bonus_points.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19

milestones.notes: Additional 5,000 EDGE Miles at INR 15,00,000 cumulative spend; total milestone earn 10,000

cashback.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (single official redemption value: 1 EDGE Mile = INR 1; Atlas does not use a multi-channel structure — value applies to Travel EDGE redemptions for flights/hotels/experiences)

voucher.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (single official redemption value: 1 EDGE Mile = INR 1; Atlas does not use a multi-channel structure — value applies to Travel EDGE redemptions for flights/hotels/experiences)

travel.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (1 EDGE Mile = INR 1, redeemable via Travel EDGE portal for flights/hotels/experiences)

annual_fee_inr.source: Axis Bank official source (annual fee INR 5,000 + GST), retrieved 2026-07-19

forex_markup_pct.source: 2 independent third-party sources (3.5% + GST, approx 4.13% effective)

fees.notes: Annual fee INR 5,000 + GST. NO spend-based renewal fee waiver exists (confidence 0.8: 3 independent third-party sources + a customer complaint thread confirming denial under current policy; official T&C is silent — absence is consistent with, not independent confirmation of, this finding). The tiered renewal bonus partially offsets the fee instead.

bonus_points.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19

welcome_bonus.notes: Cards issued 2024-04-20 onwards; credited within 7 days of qualifying transaction; paid cards only

bonus_points.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19

welcome_bonus.notes: Credited within 7 days of qualifying transaction; paid cards only

bonus_points.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19

annual_spend_threshold_inr.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (default/entry tier)

renewal_bonus_points.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (credited within 30 days of annual fee payment)

tiers.notes: Downgrades to Silver if anniversary-year spend < INR 7.5L; tier spend excludes the same categories as earn exclusions; evaluated annually on prior-year spend

tiers.name: platinum

renewal_bonus_points.source: Axis Bank official 'Atlas Credit Card Features T&Cs' PDF, retrieved 2026-07-19 (credited within 30 days of annual fee payment)

tiers.notes: Downgrades to Gold if spend >= INR 7.5L and < INR 15L, to Silver if spend < INR 7.5L
